'''Gaarn''' was an [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] in the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. Shortly after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], Gaarn was tasked with protecting the [[Eclipse (Eclipse-class)|''Eclipse'']], a [[Eclipse-class dreadnought|Super Star Destroyer]] [[Orbit/Legends|orbiting]] [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]], when it was [[Battle for the Eclipse|attacked]] by the forces of the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]], led by the [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Tyber Zann]]. Commanding from the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] [[Annihilator (Executor-class)/Legends|''Annihilator'']], Gaarn led a small [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] of three [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]] and attempted to repel the Consortium forces. However, the Imperial forces were defeated, and the ''Annihilator'' was destroyed.

==Biography==
Gaarn served the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] as an [[Admiral/Legends|admiral]] during the [[Time/Legends|time]] of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. In [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], shortly after the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]], the [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]]—a criminal organization led by [[Crime lord/Legends|crime lord]] [[Tyber Zann]]—[[Battle for the Eclipse|attacked]] the Imperial [[Shipyard/Legends|shipyards]] above the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kuat/Legends|Kuat]] to capture the [[Eclipse-class dreadnought|Super Star Destroyer]] [[Eclipse (Eclipse-class)|''Eclipse'']]. Gaarn, along with the Admiral's [[Flagship/Legends|flagship]], the [[Executor-class Star Dreadnought/Legends|''Executor''-class Star Dreadnought]] [[Annihilator (Executor-class)/Legends|''Annihilator'']], led a small [[Fleet/Legends|fleet]] of three [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyers]] to assist the struggling Imperial forces over Kuat.<ref name="FoC" />

Gaarn's fleet attacked the forces of the Zann Consortium, which had already boarded and seized control of the ''Eclipse''. The ''Annihilator'' focused on destroying the massive [[Warship/Legends|warship]] before the enemy could use it to destroy the Imperial fleet. However, the Consortium forces were able to destroy the ''Annihilator'' and all other Imperial [[Starship/Legends|ships]], allowing Zann to gain access to the data archives of the ''Eclipse''.<ref name="FoC" />

==Behind the scenes==
Gaarn was created for the [[2006]] [[LucasArts]] real-time strategy [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'', an expansion for the video game ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War]]''. Gaarn does not directly appear in ''Forces of Corruption'', but rather is mentioned in the ''Annihilator''{{'s}} infobox, which can be seen if the player moves the cursor over the ship itself during gameplay. Gaarn's ship appears in the last level of the campaign and serves as the final boss. While the ''Annihilator'' has to be destroyed in the game, Gaarn's fate is not revealed, but most likely they died.<ref name="FoC" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' {{C|Indirect appearance only}}
